storyInfo: In Nyamu's dreamland, she has abandoned drumming to enter show business in Lungmen. Each day is split between polishing her acting chops and making it to commercial activities, and she's not happy. A rare oasis of free time is wiped out by a variety show booking, where she's set to share the screen with Sora.

attributes.text: Before the gaze of thousands upon thousands, I am still as a doll.
I go where they want me to go. I make the sounds they want me to make.

attributes.content: For two days and two nights, I haven't seen a single soul...
attributes.name: Lost Girl

attributes.content: Which... which way is Lungmen? Which way is home?
attributes.name: Lost Girl

attributes.content: Dad, Mom... I'm thirsty... I'm tired...
attributes.name: Lost Girl

attributes.content: Are those... buildings, afar?
attributes.name: Lost Girl

attributes.content: I'm almost there... don't fall asleep...
attributes.name: Lost Girl

attributes.content: Cut!
Wonderful, Nyamu! That's exactly the feeling I was going for!
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: An ordinary village girl leaves everything behind on a journey to pursue her musical dreams.
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: This scene is her darkest moment. After this, a serendipitous encounter sets her on the path to becoming Lungmen's favorite musician.
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: Appreciate the compliment, D~
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Dunno why, but when I read the script, I found myself really identifying with the heroine.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Of course! It was tailor-written just for you, Miss Nyamu!
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: *Shangshu dialect* Yeah right... like we didn't rewrite it in a rush to make the New Year screening...
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: Huh...?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: The investors saw the success of The Drummer Girl and demanded we cast you for the lead role.
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: Then your agency wanted the movie out for the New Year screening, so the director here made me rewrite the script in a week...
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: In the original ending... the girl was meant to have this phantasmagoric dream in her dying moments.
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: Under a blaze of dazzling lights, an unremarkable girl staggered her way onto the awards podium.
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: There, in her dream, she finally won everyone's recognition and made peace with everything.
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: That's what the ending was supposed to be! A savage, ironic satire!
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: Ding nei goh fai, you think that trash you wrote would've got funding like this without Nyamu's name value?
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: Who gives a shake about your funding? You've been kissing sponsors' asses for so long, you've forgotten how to make art!
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: Stories like this just don't come true! Ordinary people never just get the chance to step into the spotlight!
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: *Shangshu dialect* You don't know that because you're not from the countryside! Well, I am, and I know!
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: I'll show you, third-rate hack writer—
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: They close the distance, and the war of words turns physical.
Guys, you could talk this out...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: I've always wanted to strangle you for those garbage shots of yours, ri ni xian ren ban ban!
attributes.name: Scriptwriter

attributes.content: Puk gaai, you just see, you're the first one I kick out the door when I get rich!
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: Hello?? Can you not—?!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Hospital called. Director and scriptwriter got put in the same ward. In facing beds.
attributes.name: Assistant

attributes.content: Both of them are in neck braces though, so all they do is stare at each other.
attributes.name: Assistant

attributes.content: Still, this means we can't shoot for a while...
attributes.name: Assistant

attributes.content: Well, I haven't had a proper break in a hot minute. I'd say this is a silver lining for me.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: We'll contact you once we nail down an upcoming shoot schedule for you. Just be on standby until then.
attributes.name: Assistant

attributes.content: (Mutters) Man, I don't know why, but that's a weight off my shoulders...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: No, no, I can't relax yet—
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Mom...?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: The girl picks up her phone, slides the balcony door open and steps outside.
Y'eat dinner yet, Nyamu? Y'all busy?
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Sure I ate.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Us folks at home been having a great year for wheat. Out'n the fields afore sunup, harvestin' away till sundown.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: What? Y'all don't listen when I tell ya, huh? Take it easy, slow down. Enjoy country livin'.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Jus' don't want you to go wearin' yourself too thin, sweetie. Y'get weary out there, come home and take a break.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Say, sweetie, whaddya wanna eat for the holidays? Me and Dad'll whip you up somethin'...
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: I ain't makin' it back for the holidays, c'mon! I'm always busiest when everyone else ain't...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: That so...
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: (Distant voice) Mom, y'got Sis on the phone?
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: (Sound of running)
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Sis! We saw the trailer for your new movie on TV!
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Too bad there ain't any theaters around here. We wanna buy your tickets!
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Heheh, hey, no sweat. I'll send y'all a copy when they print the discs!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Yay—!
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: You look so cool in the movie, playin' on the drums!
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: I'm startin' to learn drums too. Been usin' your old set to practice.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Betcha been gettin' mad crazy at the drums now, right? I wanna perform on stage one day just like you!
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: I... heheh, been a li'l busy lately, ain't had time to practice.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: But I'm no slacker, no way! You'n me, let's knock 'em dead!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: You bet! Okay, Mom's yellin' at us to go to bed. You sleep soon, Sis!
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Y'all take care a'yerselves! Night!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: G'night!
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Miss Nyamu, the agency just received an offer for you from a major variety show.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Recording starts tomorrow at 8pm, and it's slated to run into the early morning. Are you available?
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: That's sudden, wouldn't you say...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Well... the other guest they're inviting on is Miss Sora. The idol girl.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: She's about even with you in terms of fanbase, and she's well-regarded both inside and outside the industry.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: It's a great opportunity for exposure, and I know the schedule's a little tight, but the agency would really love for you to be on the show...
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Okay, tell them—Nyamu's looking forward to working with them all.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Great. That's a wrap for today, then.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Good night, Miss Nyamu. Sweet dreams.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: (...Well, at least I'm getting sleep tonight.)
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: She looks up at the digital clock on her coffee table. It reads '00:23'.
She flops hard on the sofa, letting it envelop her as she sinks snugly in.
How many months since I practiced last...?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Nyamu drags herself out, and over to the electronic drum set. A thin layer of dust has already formed on the cymbals.
...Where'd my sticks go?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: She has almost forgotten the last time she held a drum stick.
Was it at home? Or on the set of The Drummer Girl, even longer ago?
...Screw it. See what's on TV, then call it a day.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Hello to all my fans! Fresh new talent Nyamu here!
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: I just starred in The Drummer Girl, airing in theaters now! It's a super intriguing movie, and I hope you'll all see it on the big screen!
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: My dream's to be the best drummer in Lungmen—no, in all of Terra!
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: Come with Nyamu! Let's be the mes we wanna be~!
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: I've gotta leave some things behind sometimes. I'm a pro, that's what that means... I know that.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji
